attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WWPT.POS_TRANS_ID, 
WWPT.SRC_BATCH_ID  AS BATCH_ID,
WWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID, 
NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WWPT.QUANTITY,
WWPT.VENDOR_PART_NUM,
WWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
WWPT.REPORTED_EXTENDED_PRICE_LC, 
WWPT.CONVERSION_RATE, 
WWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD, 
WWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
WWPT.VALUATION_PRICE, 
WWPT.TRANS_DATE , 
Cast(WWPT.POSTED_DATE AS DATE) POSTED_DATE, 
CASE
   WHEN WWPT.D_TO_D_TRANS IS NULL
   THEN 'N'
    ELSE WWPT.D_TO_D_TRANS
    END AS D_TO_D_TRANS,
WWPT.MARKET_TYPE, 
WWPT.CONTRACT_TYPE, 
WWPT.CONTRACT_NO, 
CASE
   WHEN WWPT.DROP_SHIP IS NULL
   THEN 'N'
    ELSE WWPT.DROP_SHIP
    END AS DROP_SHIP,
WWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_NAME,
WWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE,
CASE WHEN WWPT.ACTIVE_FLAG IS NULL 
     THEN 'N'
     ELSE WWPT.ACTIVE_FLAG
END AS ACTIVE_FLAG,
'E_SLSORD_BATCH' AS CREATED_BY,
Current_Timestamp(0) AS CREATED_DATE, 
'E_SLSORD_BATCH' AS UPDATED_BY, 
Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
WWPT.TRANS_TYPE, 
WWPT.RESELLER_PO_NUMBER, 
WWPT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT, 
WWPT.CLAIM_AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER,
WWPT.CLAIM_TYPE, 
WWPT.SHIP_DATE, 
WWPT.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO, 
WWPT.REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE,
WWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC, 
WWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
WWPT.REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE,
WWPT.DEAL_ID, 
WWPT.POS_TYPE,
WWPT.DISTI_SO_NUM, 
WWPT.DISTI_PO_NUM, 
WWPT.ENDUSER_PO_NUM, 
WWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_NAME,
WWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_TEL,
WWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_EMAIL, 
WWPT.REPORTED_DEAL_ID, 
WWPT.CAD_PO_NUMBER_TO_CDP, 
Coalesce(BILL_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY , -999 ) AS BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,  
Coalesce(SHIP_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY , -999 ) AS BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,  
Coalesce(SOLD_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY , -999 ) AS BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,  
Coalesce(END_CUST.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY , -999 ) AS BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY, 
WWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC,
WWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
WWPT.COST_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
WWPT.ORIG_COST_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
WWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID,
CASE WHEN WWPT.SECOND_SOURCE IS NULL 
     THEN 'N'
     ELSE WWPT.SECOND_SOURCE
END AS SECOND_SOURCE, 
CASE WHEN WWPT.OFFICIAL IS NULL 
     THEN 'N'
     ELSE WWPT.OFFICIAL
END AS OFFICIAL, 
WWPT.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER, 
WWPT.SOLUTION_DATE, 
WWPT.SOLUTION_LENGTH, 
WWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE,
WWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMT,
WWPT.TRANSPORT_AMT, 
WWPT.INSTALLATION_AMT, 
WWPT.MAINTENANCE_AMT,
WWPT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMT,
WWPT.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMT,
Coalesce(NDW.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM,'-999') AS DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER,
CASE
   WHEN WWPT.SALES_CREDIT IS NULL
   THEN 'N'
    ELSE WWPT.SALES_CREDIT
    END AS SALES_CREDIT,
WWPT.CAD_SOURCE_PROFILE_ID, 
WWPT.DISTI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER,
CASE WHEN WWPT.REBILL_FLAG IS NULL 
     THEN 'N'
     ELSE WWPT.REBILL_FLAG
END AS REBILL_FLAG, 
WWPT.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
WWPT.SCC_QUOTE_NUMBER, 
WWPT.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER,
WWPT.ACTION_CODE, 
WWPT.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME,
WWPT.DIST_RPTD_CISCO_SO_NUM,
WWPT.DISTI_RPTD_END_CUST_VAT_NUMBER,
WWPT.DISTRIBUTOR_INVOICE_NUMBER, 
WWPT.RU_DISTI_RPTD_SALES_ORDER_DATE, 
WWPT.RU_DISTI_TO_SP_INVOICE_NUMBER, 
WWPT.RU_SP_TO_END_USER_INVOICE_NUM, 
WWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM, 
WWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
WWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM, 
WWPT.DISTI_RPTD_CAM_NAME,
CASE
     WHEN WWPT.QUANTITY < 0
     THEN 'Y'
     ELSE 'N'
    END AS POS_RETURN_ROLE,
CASE
    WHEN WWPT.POS_TYPE = 'LINKSYS'
    THEN 'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
    END AS LINKSYS_FLAG,
(CASE
   WHEN WWPT.VALUATION_PRICE IS NOT NULL
   THEN WWPT.VALUATION_PRICE
   ELSE WWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE 
   END) *
(CASE 
   WHEN WWPT.QUANTITY IS NOT NULL
   THEN WWPT.QUANTITY 
   ELSE 0
   END) AS PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
CASE
    WHEN WWPT.QUANTITY >= 0
    THEN WWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID
    END AS BK_REBILL_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
CASE
     WHEN WWPT.QUANTITY < 0
     THEN WWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID
    END AS RU_BK_RET_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,   
WWPT.WAREHOUSE_NUM AS DISTI_RPTD_DISTI_WHSE_NUM,
NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
WWPT.ADJUSTED_FLAG,                 
WWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME,           
WWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL,            
WWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL,          
WWPT.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY,  
WWPT.REPORTED_PARTNER_ID,           
WWPT.ORIG_BATCH_ID,                 
WWPT.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME,         
WWPT.SERVICE_SO_NUM,                
WWPT.DUP_POS_TRANS,                 
WWPT.CISCO_TO_SP_SO_NUM,            
WWPT.REPORTED_RESELLER_CERT ,
WWPT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
WWPT.CISCO_TO_SP_PO_NUM, 
WWPT.CERTIFICATION,
WWPT.RESELLER_AREA,
WWPT.ENDUSER_AREA,
WWPT.PDB_PARTNER_ID, 
WWPT.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS, 
WWPT.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE, 
WWPT.VERTICAL_MARKET, 
WWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
WWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE ,
WWPT.GPOS_REVALUED,
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/	
CASE WHEN WWPT.DSV_FLAG='Y'  THEN WWPT.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID
ELSE WWPT.POS_TRANS_ID END BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN WWPT.DSV_FLAG='Y'   THEN 'DSV_POS'
ELSE 'POS' END DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
WWPT.DSV_UNIQUE_ID AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
WWPT.STATUS AS LINE_STATUS_CD,
(CASE
   WHEN WWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC IS NOT NULL
   THEN WWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC
   ELSE WWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC 
   END) *
(CASE 
   WHEN WWPT.QUANTITY IS NOT NULL
   THEN WWPT.QUANTITY 
   ELSE 0
   END) AS PRDT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,   /* New Column added as part of Q1FY17 */
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
WWPT.MAGIC_KEY,
WWPT.START_DATE,
WWPT.END_DATE,
WWPT.DURATION,
WWPT.ORG_DISTI_RESELLER_SOL,
Coalesce(WWPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG, 'N') AS INTERNAL_POS_FLAG,
Coalesce(WWPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG, 'N') AS NET_PRICE_FLAG,
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
WWPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
WWPT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
WWPT.SERVICE_PERIOD
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_WIPS_POS_TRANS_INT  WWPT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE NDW
ON WWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID=NDW.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT     
AND	 WWPT.WAREHOUSE_NUM=NDW.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM     
/* Changed inner join to left join as part of May cd release for imposing Soft exception */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE BILL_TO
ON WWPT.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID = BILL_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SOLD_TO
ON WWPT.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID = SOLD_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SHIP_TO
ON WWPT.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID = SHIP_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE END_CUST
ON WWPT.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID = END_CUST.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON WWPT.MFG_PART_NUM = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_BATCH NPB
ON NPB.BATCH_ID_INT=WWPT.SRC_BATCH_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
ON WWPT.CISCO_TERRITORY_ID=NST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPOO
ON WWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID= NPOO.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
INNER JOIN 
( SEL POS_TRANS_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_POS_TRANS_INT WHERE DSV_FLAG = 'N'
    UNION
  SEL POS_TRANS_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_POS_TRANS_INT STG WHERE DSV_FLAG = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE BKG 
   WHERE STG.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID = BKG.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ) )WI
ON WWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = WI.POS_TRANS_ID

UNION 

SELECT 
EWPT.POS_TRANS_ID, 
EWPT.SRC_BATCH_ID  AS BATCH_ID,
EWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID, 
NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
EWPT.QUANTITY,
EWPT.VENDOR_PART_NUM,
EWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
EWPT.REPORTED_EXTENDED_PRICE_LC, 
EWPT.CONVERSION_RATE, 
EWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD, 
EWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
EWPT.VALUATION_PRICE, 
EWPT.TRANS_DATE , 
Cast(EWPT.POSTED_DATE AS DATE) POSTED_DATE, 
CASE
   WHEN EWPT.D_TO_D_TRANS IS NULL
   THEN 'N'
    ELSE EWPT.D_TO_D_TRANS
    END AS D_TO_D_TRANS,
EWPT.MARKET_TYPE, 
EWPT.CONTRACT_TYPE, 
EWPT.CONTRACT_NO, 
CASE
   WHEN EWPT.DROP_SHIP IS NULL
   THEN 'N'
    ELSE EWPT.DROP_SHIP
    END AS DROP_SHIP,
EWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_NAME,
EWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE,
CASE WHEN EWPT.ACTIVE_FLAG IS NULL 
     THEN 'N'
     ELSE EWPT.ACTIVE_FLAG
END AS ACTIVE_FLAG,
'E_SLSORD_BATCH' AS CREATED_BY,
Current_Timestamp(0) AS CREATED_DATE, 
'E_SLSORD_BATCH' AS UPDATED_BY, 
Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
EWPT.TRANS_TYPE, 
EWPT.RESELLER_PO_NUMBER, 
EWPT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT, 
EWPT.CLAIM_AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER,
EWPT.CLAIM_TYPE, 
EWPT.SHIP_DATE, 
EWPT.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO, 
EWPT.REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE,
EWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC, 
EWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE, 
EWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
EWPT.REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE, 
EWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE,
EWPT.DEAL_ID, 
EWPT.POS_TYPE,
EWPT.DISTI_SO_NUM, 
EWPT.DISTI_PO_NUM, 
EWPT.ENDUSER_PO_NUM, 
EWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_NAME,
EWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_TEL,
EWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_EMAIL, 
EWPT.REPORTED_DEAL_ID, 
EWPT.CAD_PO_NUMBER_TO_CDP, 
Coalesce(BILL_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY , -999 ) AS BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,  
Coalesce(SHIP_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY , -999 ) AS BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,  
Coalesce(SOLD_TO.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY , -999 ) AS BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,  
Coalesce(END_CUST.WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY , -999 ) AS BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY, 
EWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC,
EWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
EWPT.COST_UNIT_PRICE, 
EWPT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
EWPT.ORIG_COST_UNIT_PRICE, 
EWPT.ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
EWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID,
CASE WHEN EWPT.SECOND_SOURCE IS NULL 
     THEN 'N'
     ELSE EWPT.SECOND_SOURCE
END AS SECOND_SOURCE, 
CASE WHEN EWPT.OFFICIAL IS NULL 
     THEN 'N'
     ELSE EWPT.OFFICIAL
END AS OFFICIAL, 
EWPT.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER, 
EWPT.SOLUTION_DATE, 
EWPT.SOLUTION_LENGTH, 
EWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE,
EWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMT,
EWPT.TRANSPORT_AMT, 
EWPT.INSTALLATION_AMT, 
EWPT.MAINTENANCE_AMT,
EWPT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMT,
EWPT.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMT,
Coalesce(NDW.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM,'-999') AS DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER,
CASE
   WHEN EWPT.SALES_CREDIT IS NULL
   THEN 'N'
    ELSE EWPT.SALES_CREDIT
    END AS SALES_CREDIT,
EWPT.CAD_SOURCE_PROFILE_ID, 
EWPT.DISTI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER,
CASE WHEN EWPT.REBILL_FLAG IS NULL 
     THEN 'N'
     ELSE EWPT.REBILL_FLAG
END AS REBILL_FLAG, 
EWPT.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
EWPT.SCC_QUOTE_NUMBER, 
EWPT.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER,
EWPT.ACTION_CODE, 
EWPT.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME,
EWPT.DIST_RPTD_CISCO_SO_NUM,
EWPT.DISTI_RPTD_END_CUST_VAT_NUMBER,
EWPT.DISTRIBUTOR_INVOICE_NUMBER, 
EWPT.RU_DISTI_RPTD_SALES_ORDER_DATE, 
EWPT.RU_DISTI_TO_SP_INVOICE_NUMBER, 
EWPT.RU_SP_TO_END_USER_INVOICE_NUM, 
EWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM, 
EWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
EWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM, 
EWPT.DISTI_RPTD_CAM_NAME,
CASE
     WHEN EWPT.QUANTITY < 0
     THEN 'Y'
     ELSE 'N'
    END AS POS_RETURN_ROLE,
CASE
    WHEN EWPT.POS_TYPE = 'LINKSYS'
    THEN 'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
    END AS LINKSYS_FLAG,
(CASE
   WHEN EWPT.VALUATION_PRICE IS NOT NULL
   THEN EWPT.VALUATION_PRICE
   ELSE EWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE 
   END) *
(CASE 
   WHEN EWPT.QUANTITY IS NOT NULL
   THEN EWPT.QUANTITY 
   ELSE 0
   END) AS PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
CASE
    WHEN EWPT.QUANTITY >= 0
    THEN EWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID
    END AS BK_REBILL_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,
CASE
     WHEN EWPT.QUANTITY < 0
     THEN EWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID
    END AS RU_BK_RET_POS_TRANSACTION_ID,   
EWPT.WAREHOUSE_NUM AS DISTI_RPTD_DISTI_WHSE_NUM,
NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
EWPT.ADJUSTED_FLAG,                 
EWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME,           
EWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL,            
EWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL,          
EWPT.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY,  
EWPT.REPORTED_PARTNER_ID,           
EWPT.ORIG_BATCH_ID,                 
EWPT.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME,         
EWPT.SERVICE_SO_NUM,                
EWPT.DUP_POS_TRANS,                 
EWPT.CISCO_TO_SP_SO_NUM,            
EWPT.REPORTED_RESELLER_CERT ,
EWPT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
EWPT.CISCO_TO_SP_PO_NUM, 
EWPT.CERTIFICATION,
EWPT.RESELLER_AREA,
EWPT.ENDUSER_AREA,
EWPT.PDB_PARTNER_ID, 
EWPT.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS, 
EWPT.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE, 
EWPT.VERTICAL_MARKET, 
EWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
EWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE      ,
EWPT.GPOS_REVALUED,
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/	
CASE WHEN EWPT.DSV_FLAG='Y' THEN EWPT.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID
ELSE EWPT.POS_TRANS_ID END BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN EWPT.DSV_FLAG='Y'  THEN 'DSV_POS'
ELSE 'POS' END DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
EWPT.DSV_UNIQUE_ID AS BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
EWPT.STATUS AS LINE_STATUS_CD,
(CASE
   WHEN EWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC IS NOT NULL
   THEN EWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC
   ELSE EWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC 
   END) *
(CASE 
   WHEN EWPT.QUANTITY IS NOT NULL
   THEN EWPT.QUANTITY 
   ELSE 0
   END) AS PRDT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT, /* New column added as part of Q1FY17 */
   /* Added as part of SFP Rel */
EWPT.MAGIC_KEY,
EWPT.START_DATE,
EWPT.END_DATE,
EWPT.DURATION,
EWPT.ORG_DISTI_RESELLER_SOL,
Coalesce(EWPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG, 'N') AS INTERNAL_POS_FLAG,
Coalesce(EWPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG, 'N') AS NET_PRICE_FLAG,
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
EWPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
EWPT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
EWPT.SERVICE_PERIOD
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_WIPS_POS_TRANS  EWPT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE NDW
ON EWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID=NDW.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT     
AND	EWPT.WAREHOUSE_NUM=NDW.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM     
/* Changed inner join to left join as part of May cd release for imposing Soft exception */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE BILL_TO
ON EWPT.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID = BILL_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SOLD_TO
ON EWPT.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID = SOLD_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SHIP_TO
ON EWPT.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID = SHIP_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE END_CUST
ON EWPT.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID = END_CUST.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON EWPT.MFG_PART_NUM = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_BATCH NPB
ON NPB.BATCH_ID_INT=EWPT.SRC_BATCH_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
ON EWPT.CISCO_TERRITORY_ID=NST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPOO
ON EWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID= NPOO.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
INNER JOIN
( SEL POS_TRANS_ID FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WIPS_POS_TRANS WHERE DSV_FLAG = 'N'
    UNION
  SEL POS_TRANS_ID FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WIPS_POS_TRANS EX  WHERE DSV_FLAG = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE BKG 
   WHERE EX.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID = BKG.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ) )WI
ON EWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = WI.POS_TRANS_ID

SELECT 
WWPT.POS_TRANS_ID, 
WWPT.SRC_BATCH_ID,
WWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID, 
WWPT.STATUS, 
WWPT.CISCO_TERRITORY_ID,
WWPT.QUANTITY, 
WWPT.VENDOR_PART_NUM, 
WWPT.MFG_PART_NUM, 
WWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC, 
WWPT.REPORTED_EXTENDED_PRICE_LC, 
WWPT.CONVERSION_RATE, 
WWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD, 
WWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
WWPT.VALUATION_PRICE, 
WWPT.TRANS_DATE, 
WWPT.POSTED_DATE, 
WWPT.D_TO_D_TRANS, 
WWPT.MARKET_TYPE, 
WWPT.CONTRACT_TYPE, 
WWPT.CONTRACT_NO,
WWPT.DROP_SHIP, 
WWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_NAME, 
WWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE, 
WWPT.ACTIVE_FLAG, 
WWPT.CREATED_BY, 
WWPT.CREATED_DATE, 
WWPT.UPDATED_BY, 
WWPT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
WWPT.TRANS_TYPE, 
WWPT.RESELLER_PO_NUMBER, 
WWPT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT, 
WWPT.CLAIM_AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER, 
WWPT.CLAIM_TYPE, 
WWPT.SOURCE_CODE, 
WWPT.SHIP_DATE, 
WWPT.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO, 
WWPT.SUBSIDIARY_COUNTRY_CODE, 
WWPT.REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE, 
WWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC, 
WWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC, 
WWPT.REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.DEAL_ID, 
WWPT.POS_TYPE, 
WWPT.DISTI_SO_NUM, 
WWPT.DISTI_PO_NUM, 
WWPT.ENDUSER_PO_NUM, 
WWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_NAME, 
WWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_TEL,
WWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_EMAIL, 
WWPT.REPORTED_DEAL_ID, 
WWPT.CAD_COUNTRY_CODE, 
WWPT.CAD_NAME, 
WWPT.CAD_PO_NUMBER_TO_CDP, 
WWPT.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID,
WWPT.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID, 
WWPT.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID,
WWPT.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID, 
WWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC, 
WWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC, 
WWPT.COST_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.ORIG_COST_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE, 
WWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID, 
WWPT.SECOND_SOURCE,
WWPT.OFFICIAL, 
WWPT.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER, 
WWPT.SOLUTION_DATE, 
WWPT.SOLUTION_LENGTH, 
WWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE, 
WWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMT, 
WWPT.TRANSPORT_AMT, 
WWPT.INSTALLATION_AMT, 
WWPT.MAINTENANCE_AMT, 
WWPT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMT,
WWPT.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMT, 
WWPT.WAREHOUSE_NUM, 
WWPT.SALES_CREDIT, 
WWPT.CAD_SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
WWPT.DISTI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER, 
WWPT.REBILL_FLAG, 
WWPT.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
WWPT.SCC_QUOTE_NUMBER, 
WWPT.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER, 
WWPT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
WWPT.BATCH_ID, 
WWPT.ACTION_CODE, 
WWPT.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME,
WWPT.DIST_RPTD_CISCO_SO_NUM, 
WWPT.DISTI_RPTD_END_CUST_VAT_NUMBER,
WWPT.DISTRIBUTOR_INVOICE_NUMBER, 
WWPT.RU_DISTI_RPTD_SALES_ORDER_DATE, 
WWPT.RU_DISTI_TO_SP_INVOICE_NUMBER, 
WWPT.RU_SP_TO_END_USER_INVOICE_NUM, 
WWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM, 
WWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
WWPT.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM, 
WWPT.DISTI_RPTD_CAM_NAME, 
WWPT.ADJUSTED_FLAG,                 
WWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME,           
WWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL,            
WWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL,          
WWPT.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY,  
WWPT.REPORTED_PARTNER_ID,           
WWPT.ORIG_BATCH_ID,                 
WWPT.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME,         
WWPT.SERVICE_SO_NUM,                
WWPT.DUP_POS_TRANS,      
WWPT.CISCO_TO_SP_SO_NUM,            
WWPT.REPORTED_RESELLER_CERT,            
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
WWPT.CISCO_TO_SP_PO_NUM, 
WWPT.CERTIFICATION, 
WWPT.RESELLER_AREA, 
WWPT.ENDUSER_AREA, 
WWPT.PDB_PARTNER_ID, 
WWPT.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS, 
WWPT.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE, 
WWPT.VERTICAL_MARKET, 
WWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
WWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE ,
WWPT.GPOS_REVALUED,
WWPT.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID,
WWPT.DSV_FLAG,
WWPT.DSV_UNIQUE_ID,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
WWPT.MAGIC_KEY,
WWPT.START_DATE,
WWPT.END_DATE,
WWPT.DURATION,
WWPT.ORG_DISTI_RESELLER_SOL,
WWPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG,
WWPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG,
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
WWPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
WWPT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
WWPT.SERVICE_PERIOD
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_WIPS_POS_TRANS_INT  WWPT
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 
        		FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE BILL_TO,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SOLD_TO,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE SHIP_TO,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_WIPS_CUSTOMER_SITE END_CUST,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP,
			     $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST,
			     $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_BATCH NPB,
				 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPOO,
				 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NBPTL
				 
		WHERE WWPT.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID = BILL_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
		AND WWPT.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID = SOLD_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
		AND WWPT.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID = SHIP_TO.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
		AND WWPT.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID = END_CUST.BK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
		AND WWPT.MFG_PART_NUM = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
		AND NPB.BATCH_ID_INT=WWPT.SRC_BATCH_ID
		AND WWPT.CISCO_TERRITORY_ID=NST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
        AND  WWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID= NPOO.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
		AND WWPT.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID = NBPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
		)

SELECT
SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID,
SWPT.SRC_BATCH_ID,
SWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
SWPT.STATUS,
SWPT.CISCO_TERRITORY_ID,
SWPT.QUANTITY,
SWPT.VENDOR_PART_NUM,
SWPT.MFG_PART_NUM,
SWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
SWPT.REPORTED_EXTENDED_PRICE_LC,
SWPT.CONVERSION_RATE,
SWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD,
SWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.VALUATION_PRICE,
SWPT.TRANS_DATE,
SWPT.POSTED_DATE,
SWPT.D_TO_D_TRANS,
SWPT.MARKET_TYPE,
SWPT.CONTRACT_TYPE,
SWPT.CONTRACT_NO,
SWPT.DROP_SHIP,
SWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_NAME,
SWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE,
SWPT.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SWPT.CREATED_BY,
SWPT.CREATED_DATE,
SWPT.UPDATED_BY,
SWPT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SWPT.TRANS_TYPE,
SWPT.RESELLER_PO_NUMBER,
SWPT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT,
MAX(T.DETAIL_VALUE) CLAIM_AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER, 
SWPT.CLAIM_TYPE,
SWPT.SOURCE_CODE,
SWPT.SHIP_DATE,
SWPT.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO,
SWPT.SUBSIDIARY_COUNTRY_CODE    ,
SWPT.REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE     ,
SWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC    ,
SWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE       ,
SWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC    ,
SWPT.REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE    ,
SWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.DEAL_ID    ,
SWPT.POS_TYPE,
SWPT.DISTI_SO_NUM,
SWPT.DISTI_PO_NUM,
SWPT.ENDUSER_PO_NUM,
SWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_NAME,
SWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_TEL,
SWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_EMAIL,
SWPT.REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
SWPT.CAD_COUNTRY_CODE,
SWPT.CAD_NAME,
SWPT.CAD_PO_NUMBER_TO_CDP,
SWPT.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID,
SWPT.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID,
SWPT.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID,
SWPT.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID,
SWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC,
SWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
SWPT.COST_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.ORIG_COST_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID,
SWPT.SECOND_SOURCE,
SWPT.OFFICIAL,
SWPT.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
SWPT.SOLUTION_DATE,
SWPT.SOLUTION_LENGTH,
SWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE,
SWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMT,
SWPT.TRANSPORT_AMT,
SWPT.INSTALLATION_AMT,
SWPT.MAINTENANCE_AMT,
SWPT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMT,
SWPT.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMT,
SWPT.WAREHOUSE_NUM,
SWPT.SALES_CREDIT,
SWPT.CAD_SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
SWPT.DISTI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER,
SWPT.REBILL_FLAG,
SWPT.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
SWPT.SCC_QUOTE_NUMBER,
SWPT.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER,
SWPT.CREATE_DATETIME,
SWPT.BATCH_ID,
SWPT.ACTION_CODE,
MAX(B.DETAIL_VALUE) DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME,
MAX(C.DETAIL_VALUE) DIST_RPTD_CISCO_SO_NUM,
MAX(D.DETAIL_VALUE) DISTI_RPTD_END_CUST_VAT_NUMBER,
MAX(E.DETAIL_VALUE) DISTRIBUTOR_INVOICE_NUMBER,
MAX( CAST(F.DETAIL_VALUE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYYMMDD')) RU_DISTI_RPTD_SALES_ORDER_DATE,
MAX(G.DETAIL_VALUE) RU_DISTI_TO_SP_INVOICE_NUMBER,
MAX(H.DETAIL_VALUE) RU_SP_TO_END_USER_INVOICE_NUM,
MAX(I.DETAIL_VALUE) RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM,
MAX(J.DETAIL_VALUE) RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
MAX(K.DETAIL_VALUE) RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM,
MAX(L.DETAIL_VALUE) DISTI_RPTD_CAM_NAME,
SWPT.ADJUSTED_FLAG,                
SWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME,
SWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL  ,          
SWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL ,         
SWPT.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY,
SWPT.REPORTED_PARTNER_ID,
SWPT.ORIG_BATCH_ID,
SWPT.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME,
SWPT.SERVICE_SO_NUM,
SWPT.DUP_POS_TRANS,
MAX(M.DETAIL_VALUE) CISCO_TO_SP_SO_NUM,
MAX(N.DETAIL_VALUE) REPORTED_RESELLER_CERT,  
MAX(O.DETAIL_VALUE) CISCO_TO_SP_PO_NUM,
MAX(P.DETAIL_VALUE) CERTIFICATION, 
MAX(Q.DETAIL_VALUE) RESELLER_AREA, 
MAX(R.DETAIL_VALUE) ENDUSER_AREA, 
SWPT.PDB_PARTNER_ID, 
SWPT.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS, 
SWPT.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE, 
MAX(S.DETAIL_VALUE) VERTICAL_MARKET, 
SWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC, 
SWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE ,
SWPT.GPOS_REVALUED,

CASE WHEN DSV_FLAG='N' THEN -9999
ELSE SWPT.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID END AS DSV_TRANSACTION_ID,

SWPT.DSV_FLAG, 

CASE WHEN DSV_FLAG='N' THEN -9999
ELSE SWPT.DSV_UNIQUE_ID END AS DSV_UNIQUE_ID,
/* Added as part of SFP  Rel */
SWPT.MAGIC_KEY,
SWPT.START_DATE,
SWPT.END_DATE,
SWPT.DURATION,
SWPT.ORG_DISTI_RESELLER_SOL,
SWPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG,
SWPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG,
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
SWPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
SWPT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
SWPT.SERVICE_PERIOD
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS SWPT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS B
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = B.POS_TRANS_ID
AND B.DETAIL_TYPE = 'SALESMAN'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS C
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = C.POS_TRANS_ID
AND C.DETAIL_TYPE = 'CISCO SALES ORDER NUMBER'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS D
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = D.POS_TRANS_ID
AND D.DETAIL_TYPE = 'END CUSTOMER VAT NUMBER'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS E
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = E.POS_TRANS_ID
AND E.DETAIL_TYPE = 'INVOICE NUMBER'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS F
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = F.POS_TRANS_ID
AND F.DETAIL_TYPE = 'SALES ORDER DATE'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS G
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = G.POS_TRANS_ID
AND G.DETAIL_TYPE = 'DISTI TO SP INVOICE NUM'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS H
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = H.POS_TRANS_ID
AND H.DETAIL_TYPE = 'SP TO ENDUSER INVOICE NUM'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS I
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = I.POS_TRANS_ID
AND I.DETAIL_TYPE =  'ORIGINAL SALES ORDER'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS J
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = J.POS_TRANS_ID
AND J.DETAIL_TYPE = 'ORIG DISTI TO RES INV NUM'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS K
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = K.POS_TRANS_ID
AND K.DETAIL_TYPE = 'ORIG RE-BILL INVOICE NUMBER'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS L
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = L.POS_TRANS_ID
AND L.DETAIL_TYPE = 'ACCOUNT MANAGERS CODE'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS M
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = M.POS_TRANS_ID
AND M.DETAIL_TYPE =  'CISCO TO SP SO NUM'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS N
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = N.POS_TRANS_ID
AND N.DETAIL_TYPE = 'REPORTED RESELLER CERTIFICATION' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS O
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = O.POS_TRANS_ID
AND O.DETAIL_TYPE = 'CISCO TO SP PO NUM' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS P
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = P.POS_TRANS_ID
AND P.DETAIL_TYPE = 'CERTIFICATION' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS Q
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = Q.POS_TRANS_ID
AND Q.DETAIL_TYPE = 'RESELLER AREA' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS R
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = R.POS_TRANS_ID
AND R.DETAIL_TYPE = 'ENDUSER AREA' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS S
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = S.POS_TRANS_ID
AND S.DETAIL_TYPE = 'VERTICAL MARKET' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_POS_TRANS_DETAILS T
ON SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID = T.POS_TRANS_ID
AND T.DETAIL_TYPE ='CLAIM AUTHORIZATION NO'


GROUP BY
SWPT.POS_TRANS_ID,
SWPT.SRC_BATCH_ID,
SWPT.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
SWPT.STATUS,
SWPT.CISCO_TERRITORY_ID,
SWPT.QUANTITY,
SWPT.VENDOR_PART_NUM,
SWPT.MFG_PART_NUM,
SWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
SWPT.REPORTED_EXTENDED_PRICE_LC,
SWPT.CONVERSION_RATE,
SWPT.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD,
SWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.VALUATION_PRICE,
SWPT.TRANS_DATE,
SWPT.POSTED_DATE,
SWPT.D_TO_D_TRANS,
SWPT.MARKET_TYPE,
SWPT.CONTRACT_TYPE,
SWPT.CONTRACT_NO,
SWPT.DROP_SHIP,
SWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_NAME,
SWPT.SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE,
SWPT.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SWPT.CREATED_BY,
SWPT.CREATED_DATE,
SWPT.UPDATED_BY,
SWPT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SWPT.TRANS_TYPE,
SWPT.RESELLER_PO_NUMBER,
SWPT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT,
SWPT.CLAIM_TYPE,
SWPT.SOURCE_CODE,
SWPT.SHIP_DATE,
SWPT.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO,
SWPT.SUBSIDIARY_COUNTRY_CODE    ,
SWPT.REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE     ,
SWPT.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC    ,
SWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE       ,
SWPT.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC    ,
SWPT.REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE    ,
SWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.DEAL_ID    ,
SWPT.POS_TYPE,
SWPT.DISTI_SO_NUM,
SWPT.DISTI_PO_NUM,
SWPT.ENDUSER_PO_NUM,
SWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_NAME,
SWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_TEL,
SWPT.ENDUSER_CONTACT_EMAIL,
SWPT.REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
SWPT.CAD_COUNTRY_CODE,
SWPT.CAD_NAME,
SWPT.CAD_PO_NUMBER_TO_CDP,
SWPT.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID,
SWPT.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID,
SWPT.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID,
SWPT.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID,
SWPT.VALUATION_PRICE_LC,
SWPT.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
SWPT.COST_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.ORIG_COST_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID,
SWPT.SECOND_SOURCE,
SWPT.OFFICIAL,
SWPT.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
SWPT.SOLUTION_DATE,
SWPT.SOLUTION_LENGTH,
SWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE,
SWPT.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMT,
SWPT.TRANSPORT_AMT,
SWPT.INSTALLATION_AMT,
SWPT.MAINTENANCE_AMT,
SWPT.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMT,
SWPT.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMT,
SWPT.WAREHOUSE_NUM,
SWPT.SALES_CREDIT,
SWPT.CAD_SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
SWPT.DISTI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER,
SWPT.REBILL_FLAG,
SWPT.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
SWPT.SCC_QUOTE_NUMBER,
SWPT.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER,
SWPT.CREATE_DATETIME,
SWPT.BATCH_ID,
SWPT.ACTION_CODE,
SWPT.ADJUSTED_FLAG,                
SWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME,
SWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL  ,          
SWPT.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL ,         
SWPT.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY,
SWPT.REPORTED_PARTNER_ID,
SWPT.ORIG_BATCH_ID,
SWPT.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME,
SWPT.SERVICE_SO_NUM,
SWPT.DUP_POS_TRANS,
SWPT.PDB_PARTNER_ID, 
SWPT.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS, 
SWPT.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE, 
SWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC, 
SWPT.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE,
SWPT.GPOS_REVALUED,
SWPT.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID,
SWPT.DSV_FLAG,
SWPT.DSV_UNIQUE_ID,
SWPT.MAGIC_KEY,
SWPT.START_DATE,
SWPT.END_DATE,
SWPT.DURATION,
SWPT.ORG_DISTI_RESELLER_SOL,
SWPT.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG,
SWPT.NET_PRICE_FLAG,
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
SWPT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
SWPT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
SWPT.SERVICE_PERIOD
